name: Party Quiche
recipeIngredient: pastry to line a 9-inch pie pan
1/2 cup grated process Gruyere cheese or 3 (1 oz.) size triangles of cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Line pie pan with pastry, creating a low fluted rim.
2. Sprinkle bacon and cheeses in the crust; set aside.
3. In a medium bowl, beat eggs and add cream. Combine remaining ingredients separately.
4. Pour egg mixture over cheese and bacon.
5. Place in freezer and freeze for 2 to 3 hours until solid.
6. Remove from freezer. Wrap with heavy-duty foil, sealing tightly with freezer tape, and return to freezer.
7. To serve: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C). Remove quiche from freezer and unwrap. Cover a piece of foil over the quiche and cut a 5-inch circle from the center.
8. Place the quiche on lightly in the oven for 45 minutes in the lower quarter.
9. Reduce temperature to 325 degrees F (165 degrees C) and remove foil. Bake for 15 to 20 more minutes.
10. Place quiche still in pan on plate. Cut into narrow wedges.
